title: Alistella's Alchemy Lab
description:
* All characters in this game are 18 years old or older.

Alchemist Alistella -

She was the only person with magic power in this world.

She was admired as the hero to defeat the monsters and the devil, who summon the monsters.

She had a purpose.

It was to go back to her original world.

Her last memory of the real world was shielding her mother from her father’s violence before losing consciousness.

To see her mother and her boyfriend once again,

she seeks the way to defeat the devil and return to her world.

At least, that was what she thought this was about.

In reality, everything, including her ability, and this world was designed by the devil.

It was all part of the game.

To use magic and alchemy, she has to let the devil play with her body .

As she goes on her adventure to return to her people,

the devil slowly chips away at her soul.

++———————————————————————————++

Alice Inaba(Alistella)

She was sent to another world.

She was given the power of magic, and became Alchemist Alistella.

She went on a journey to defeat Death Heart, ruler of the world, to return to her world.

But it was not what she thought.

It was all made up by a devil who tricked her into this.

++———————————————————————————++

~ System ~

Materials:

Collect materials for alchemy from natural objects like flowers, trees, and mushrooms found on the map.

Alchemy:

Use collected items and drop items to craft equipment and items. Alchemy can help her fight stronger monsters. Alchemy is available on the second floor of the base.

Combat:

With Live2D, the characters are animated during combat! Use magic and crafted equipment to defeat monsters and level up.

When she is defeated, it will not lead to game over. However, she will run out of AP, which is crucial for alchemy.

* There are ways to make the game easier, including difficulty selection.
description_short: Alchemist Alistella - She was the only person with magic power in this world. She had a purpose. It was to go back to her original world. She seeks the way to defeat the devil and return to her world. - At least, that was what she thought this was about.
